text.title: go-backend Output Contract
text.summary: Required directory tree and per-file invariants for a Go HTTP backend.

section.title: JSON Schema (project tree)

example.code: github.com/acme/svc/ ├── cmd/ │ └── api/main.go # thin: config -> deps -> router -> server ├── internal/ │ ├── handler/ # thin handlers, ShouldBindJSON │ ├── service/ # business logic, defines UserRepository interface │ ├── repository/ # implements service interfaces │ ├── model/ # domain structs, no HTTP tags │ ├── middleware/ # ErrorHandler, Logger, RequestID │ └── config/ # envconfig binding ├── pkg/ # exported re-usables (rare) ├── migrations/ └── go.mod
example.note: internal/ never imported from outside the module. main.go imports only internal/* setup helpers.

list.item: cmd/api/main.go exists; it imports config + deps + router + server, nothing else.
No file outside the module imports `<module>/internal/`.
Interfaces declared in service/, not repository/.
Every exported I/O function has ctx context.Context as first arg.
Handlers call c.Error(err) on failure, never c.JSON for errors.
Worker Pool.Submit selects on ctx.Done() as well as the jobs channel.
